name: Peppered-London Broil with Lime-Marinated Onions
recipeIngredient: 2 Red Onion, Peeled And Very Thinly Sliced
1 lb London Broil, About 1 Inch Thick
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small nonreactive bowl, combine the thinly sliced onions, lime juice, and Tabasco sauce. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours but less than 6.
2. Rub the London Broil all over with black pepper and salt. Sprinkle half of the flour on each side of the meat.
3. Sauté the meat in a large sauté pan (without oil) over high heat until well seasoned, about 5 to 7 minutes per side for rare.
4. Remove from heat and serve the meat in thick slices, topped with a generous portion of the marinated onions.
Per serving: 210 calories, 5 grams fat.
